Log:
  DSBAutostart is a Qt program that allows you to manage commands to be executed
  at X session start.

  WWW: http://freeshell.de/~mk/projects/dsbautostart.html

  PR:		221131
  Submitted by:	Marcel Kaiser (maintainer)

  Approved by:	matthew (mentor)
